description: rank_search_matches re-ranks the staged 1860-census Mullen results against tree subject I1 (Sarah Ann Mullen, b.1852 Dodge County, Wisconsin). The birth-surname search recovered the correct household (Sarah A. Mullen, age 8, child of William Mullen), which scores as a strong match and is unattached (new evidence for extraction). Confirms the pre-marriage search correctly used the BirthName surname 'Mullen' — the record is the right person. Used by the search-records name-shift triage test to exercise the match-ranked review surface + attachment flags without a live match API. Matched on subjectId; independent of the stagedResultsRef handle (a per-run uuid).
